---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Ritemark
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? What's frustrating about the current experience?

## Proposed Solution
Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered
Have you thought about other ways to solve this? Why is your proposed solution better?

## Additional Context
Any mockups, screenshots, or examples that help explain the feature.

## Use Case
Who would benefit from this feature? How would they use it?
